text.title: AGENTS.md Context Pyramid Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of kb-agents-md-context-pyramid. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Root AGENTS.md grows to 500 lines containing everything; agent loads it on every task; budget burns.
Subdirectories have no AGENTS.md; agent reconstructs context from filenames.
antipattern.fix: Audit script flags dirs with logic but no AGENTS.md.

antipattern.symptom: Links point to `/src/foo.py`; after refactor everything breaks.
